mapper.select: SELECT id FROM identity_subject WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(mobile, ''), #{fallback}) FROM user_account WHERE id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO identity_subject (id, subject_type, phone, status) VALUES (#{id}, 'person', #{phone}, 'active')
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM identity_subject WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
